Date: Encounter Location: Provider: Weight: Allergy: Allergy Date:
INFO - FormEntrySession.(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,760| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=null | mode=VIEW INFO - FormEntrySession.(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,804| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=2 | mode=EDIT DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,863| For concept WEIGHT (KG): 50.0 -> 100.0 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(348) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,863| CHANGED: WEIGHT (KG) = 50.0 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,863| For concept NO: Penicillin -> Penicillin DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(360) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,864| SAME: NO = Penicillin DEBUG - FormEntrySession.applyActions(666) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,864| voiding obs: 101 INFO - FormEntrySession.applyActions(698) |2026-06-19 08:49:04,875| AUDIT | action=ENCOUNTER_EDIT | userId=1 | patientId=2 | encounterId=101 | formId=null

testcase.name: editingFormWithoutPatientTagsShouldNotUpdatePatientDateChanged
testcase.system-out: INFO - FormEntrySession.<init>(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,108| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=2 | mode=ENTER INFO - FormEntrySession.<init>(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,140| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=2 | mode=VIEW INFO - FormEntrySession.<init>(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,158| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=2 | mode=EDIT DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,196| For concept WEIGHT (KG): 50.0 -> 75.0 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(348) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,197| CHANGED: WEIGHT (KG) = 50.0 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,197| For concept NO: Penicillin -> Bee stings DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(348) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,198| CHANGED: NO = Penicillin DEBUG - FormEntrySession.applyActions(666) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,198| voiding obs: 101 DEBUG - FormEntrySession.applyActions(666) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,199| voiding obs: 102 INFO - FormEntrySession.applyActions(698) |2026-06-19 08:49:05,208| AUDIT | action=ENCOUNTER_EDIT | userId=1 | patientId=2 | encounterId=101 | formId=null

testcase.name: testEditPatientAndCreatingObs
testcase.system-out: INFO - FormEntrySession.<init>(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,240| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=2 | mode=ENTER INFO - FormEntrySession.applyActions(575) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,298| AUDIT | action=ENCOUNTER_CREATE | userId=1 | patientId=2 | encounterId=111 | formId=null INFO - FormEntrySession.<init>(146) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,306| AUDIT | action=FORM_OPEN | userId=1 | patientId=2 | mode=EDIT DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,366| For concept WEIGHT (KG): 75.0 -> 75.0 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(360) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,367| SAME: WEIGHT (KG) = 75.0 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,367| For concept ALLERGY: Bee stings -> Bee stings DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(360) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,367| SAME: ALLERGY = Bee stings DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(335) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,368| For concept ALLERGY DATE: 2026-06-19 -> 2026-06-19 DEBUG - FormSubmissionActions.modifyObs(360) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,368| SAME: ALLERGY DATE = 2026-06-19 INFO - FormEntrySession.applyActions(698) |2026-06-19 08:49:07,372| AUDIT | action=ENCOUNTER_EDIT | userId=1 | patientId=2 | encounterId=111 | formId=null
